name: Tiancheng Hang

Proficient in JSX/TSX, React, Zustand, react-router; familiar with React Fiber architecture and React performance optimization (hooks, virtual scrolling, SWR)
Familiar with data structures, computer networking; aware of design patterns
Proficient in Vite, familiar with Webpack

works.title: ByteDance
works.content: 2025-06 ~ 2025-09, Product R&D and Engineering Architecture, TikTok Performance team; terminal device performance data forwarded via Kafka to Redis, MySQL, ClickHouse; backend in Golang with Kitex framework, Thrift-generated npm packages for BFF consumption, BFF layer for data cleansing and frontend visualization; multi-layer caching to reduce DB load; BFF in Nest.js calling backend RPC methods and exposing HTTP APIs; frontend in React, Zustand, react-router, Semi Design, Echarts; performance optimization hooks, virtual scroll lists; contributed to CloudWeGo Kitex and Coze-JS open source

works.title: Tencent
works.content: 2025-10 ~ 2026-02, IEG Interactive Entertainment, Infrastructure Tech; responsible for Tencent NoSQL DB management system; frontend migration of React class components to function components, performance optimization hooks, debugging data races from closure refs and unstable API response times; backend TCP connection pool; maintaining process pool calling C++ .so DLLs for encryption/decryption and table file parsing; valgrind for memory leak detection across Node and C++ .so DLLs, maintaining object pools and leveraging V8 hidden classes to reduce GC pressure

works.title: ByteDance
works.content: 2026-02 ~ 2026-05, Data-Architecture, search and recommendation platform, Douyin Debug platform, LLM-based JSError auto-fix, SWR performance optimization, A2UI React framework integration

works.title: Alibaba
works.content: 2026-05 ~ present, Alimama Ad Tech; responsible for Server & Schema-Driven UI development; Webpack/Vite Module Federation integration, contributing to @module-federation/vite open source; A2UI integration

projects.title: Frontend Instrumentation / Performance Monitoring
projects.content: https://github.com/hangtiancheng/swifty-sentry — Npm @swifty/sentry, framework-agnostic frontend monitoring SDK with pub/sub architecture, decoupled core and plugin modules; supports error capture, blank-screen detection, performance metrics, and session replay; error coverage includes resource load errors, JSError, unhandled promise rejections, XHR/fetch errors, with LRU and error deduplication, tracing click events and route changes; blank-screen detection via key-point sampling; performance module computes LCP/FCP/CLS/INP metrics and first-screen render time via Observer APIs, detects longTask; rrweb + gzip session replay, 3-level fallback for data reporting: navigator.sendBeacon -> Image beacon -> fetch keepAlive, offline storage via localStorage with auto-flush on network recovery

projects.title: CLI Coding Agent
projects.content: https://github.com/hangtiancheng/swifty-cli — Npm @swifty/swifty, a lightweight CLI Coding Agent; 5-layer architecture with multi-LLM provider support; AI-friendly toolset; ReAct paradigm with Agent Loop alternating reasoning and action to autonomously complete coding tasks; carefully designed System Prompt; 5-level permission system; MCP integration; safe, high-quality context compression; instruction files, session persistence, LLM-driven memory extraction and periodic memory consolidation; supports Slash Command, Skill, Hook; inspired by Claude Code design with worktree file isolation, predefined/fork Subagents, and multi-teammate Agent Team collaboration

research: Research: reinforcement learning for network congestion control, multi-core parallel network simulation
